violations.text: Establishment does not have an individual with Rhode Island Manager Certified In Food Safety license. Application provided during time of inspection. Establishment to register. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

Guac, cut lettuce and salsa over ice were observed held at 44-55 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were assessed and placed into refrigeration to blast chill. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2026

Meat was observed thawing on the counter in stagnant water. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2026

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/12/2026
An allergy statement is lacking on the menu. Per PIC, allergy statement will be added to the menu when they are re-printed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the bar dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment is to wash rinse and sanitize all dishes and utensils in the kitchen dishwasher until the bar dishwasher is able to reach the proper sanitizer concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025

ROP tuna and ROP mahi-mahi was observed thawing with ROP packaging still intact. All fish but 1 were observed at 37 DF. Fish was taken out of package to thaw at the time of inspection. 1 ROP tuna filet was observed at 40 DF and was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025

The following equipment was observed in poor repair. -The walk-in cooler gasket -The sanitizer dispenser at the 3-bay sink -Prep unit handles Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025
The establishment is missing drain plugs for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain drain plugs. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2025
The 3-bay sink pipe was observed leaking into a container. Establishment is to leak. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025
The floor in the kitchen area was observed to be chipping. Physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/08/2025

The floor throughout the storage room has an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025
The following were observed in poor repair. -Walk-in cooler gasket -Prep unit handles -Hot water handle at hand sink Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2024
The 3-bay sink was observed leaking into a container. Establishment must fix leak. New Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2024
The floor in the kitchen area was observed to be chipping. Physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils ice machine were observed with an accumulation of debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine must be cleaned and sanitized before using. New Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2024
The following were observed in poor repair. -Walk-in cooler gasket -Prep unit handles -Hot water handle at hand sink Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the dishwasher have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Establishment is to install air gap. New Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2024
The 3-bay sink was observed leaking into a container. Establishment must fix leak. Dump sink was observed not draining. Dump sink must be able to properly drain. New Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2024

Pest droppings were observed under the 3-bay sink, and in the storage room. Establishment is to clean any and all dropping using proper methods of cleaning. Per PIC, pest control was called and coming today. New Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2024
The floor in the kitchen area was observed to be chipping. Physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2025
